p.br: User Initiates Checkout via Frontend UI

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GTM DataLayer Event: checkout_progress
(Capture Cart Payload & Session ID)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Async API Check:
ERP Stock Validation

div.style: color: rgb(198, 40, 40) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Soft-Error Handler: Trigger Backorder UI
or Dynamic Product Substitution Offer

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Authentication &
GEO-IP Match Verification

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Initialize Temporary Session State
Enforce 1-Click Cart Save via LocalStorage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fetch Profile via Master Customer Database
Pre-populate Tokenized Shipping Matrix

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Shipping Rate API Gateway Fetch

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is Cart Value >= Free Shipping Threshold
OR Shipping API Latency > 1500ms?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Inject 'Free Shipping' Promotion Component
Update Order Metadata Payload

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Calculate Dynamic Shipping Margin
Render Multi-Carrier Rates (UPS/DHL/CTT)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tokenized Payment Gateway Request
(Stripe / PayPal API V3)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Payment Processor Response

div.style: color: rgb(198, 40, 40) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Extract Decline Code (e.g., Insufficient Funds)
Trigger Client-Side Micro-Copy Assistance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Push Webhook Payload to Klaviyo/HubSpot
Initiate Behavioral Abandonment Flow at T+15m

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Generate Immutable Order ID
Clear Frontend LocalStorage State

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Webhook 1: ERP Billing &
Inventory Update (FIFO)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Webhook 2: Marketing Analytics Pipelines
(Calculate LTV & CAC Attribution)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Webhook 3: Trigger Transactional Messaging
via SendGrid / Twilio API
